top_signals.title: Inside Zara: Inditex CEO Exclusive on Fashion & AI | The Pulse 5/22/2026
top_signals.summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests:
Clemens Fuest, Ifo Institute, President; Wei Li, BlackRock, Global Chief Investment Strategist; Eléonore Caroit, French Government, Deputy Foreign Minister;  Óscar García Maceiras, Inditex, CEO.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Galaxy’s Novogratz and BitGo face off in court over $100 million claim: Bloomberg
top_signals.summary: In 2022, Galaxy said it was abandoning its acquisition plan due to BitGo's 'failure to deliver ... audited financial statements for 2021.'
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: New US-Built Ferry Begins Service in US Virgin Islands
top_signals.summary: A new Incat Crowther-designed passenger ferry has entered service in the U.S. Virgin Islands, operating between Red Hook on St. Thomas and Cruz Bay on St. John.The 104-foot (32-meter) vessel, named Spirit of 1733, was built by Gulf Craft in Louisiana and is approved under U.S.
